title: Building a distributed IDS taught me something no DSA problem ever did
preview: Systems don't fail because someone couldn't write a loop. They fail because assumptions weren't questioned.

title: Nobody overspends because they lack willpower
preview: They overspend because someone spent millions designing the system to make sure they would.

title: In 2016, Mirai took down Twitter through home cameras and DVRs
preview: We now have 3x more IoT devices than people on earth. The vulnerabilities haven't kept up.

title: My model hit 88% accuracy. I should have felt good about that.
preview: Instead my first thought was: what is it missing in the other 12%? And then a harder question followed.

title: I built my own Jarvis. Named the agents after Star Wars characters.
preview: Not for the theme. For the function. Six agents. Each one a different model. Each one chosen for a specific reason.
